title: Disjoint Sets, Connectivity, and Offline Grouping · Invariant Recall
summary: Track changing network connectivity across merges without scanning every member. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a union-find service with measured compression after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent disjoint sets as parent forests with explicit representative invariants.
Apply union by rank or size without corrupting representative metadata.
Trace path compression and explain its interaction with later finds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
